# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  access_log_path: /dev/null
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901

stats_config:
  stats_tag: envoy-api-gateway

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http.v3.HttpFilter
          name: envoy.filters.http.router
          typed_config:
            "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
  - name: backend_service_0
    connect_timeout: 0.25s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_service_0
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: backend_service_0.example.com
                port_value: 80

  - name: backend_service_1
    connect_timeout: 0.25s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_service_1
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: backend_service_1.example.com
                port_value: 80

  - name: healthcheck_cluster
    connect_timeout: 0.25s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: healthcheck.example.com
        port_value: 80

  routes:
  - name: route_0
    match:
      prefix: /api/v1/
    route:
      cluster: backend_service_0

  - name: route_1
    match:
      prefix: /api/v2/
    route:
      cluster: backend_service_1

  - name: healthcheck_route
    match:
      prefix: /healthcheck/
    route:
      cluster: healthcheck_cluster
